compiled_state.title: Add REPLAN_ESCALATE emission logic to implementation-plan SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context
Story ca76-bb4e: Implementation task. Add REPLAN_ESCALATE signal emission to implementation-plan/SKILL.md. Tasks fa7b-d4e9 (contract), b6f7-9f1c (RED eval), and bd1a-14a3 (RED pytest) must be complete before this task runs.

## What To Do
Modify `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md` to add REPLAN_ESCALATE emission logic.

### 1. Add to the Ambiguity Scan subsection (Step 1)

After the existing ambiguity resolution guidance, add a new subsection titled "Unsatisfiable Criteria Detection":

When the Ambiguity Scan reveals that success criteria CANNOT be satisfied — not because they are unclear (which uses STATUS:blocked), but because they are:
- Actively contradicted by codebase state (e.g., SC says 'build X' but X was permanently deleted in a previous closed task)
- Internally contradictory (SC item A and SC item B are mutually exclusive)
- Impossible to satisfy simultaneously given the current architecture

Then emit the REPLAN_ESCALATE signal and STOP (do not proceed to task drafting).

### 2. Signal emission format (read from contract fa7b-d4e9)

The exact format is:
```
REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm EXPLANATION: <human-readable explanation of the contradiction or impossibility>
```

The explanation must include:
- What success criterion cannot be satisfied
- Why it cannot be satisfied (what codebase state contradicts it)
- What the orchestrator should investigate in brainstorm

### 3. Add to Status Emission section (Step 6 / STATUS output)

In the STATUS emission section, add a third signal type alongside STATUS:complete and STATUS:blocked:
```
REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm EXPLANATION:<explanation>
```
Document: "Emitted when success criteria cannot be satisfied and require brainstorm-level re-evaluation. The calling orchestrator (sprint) is responsible for routing this signal. Do not emit this for normal ambiguity — that uses STATUS:blocked."

### 4. Distinction clause

Explicitly document the distinction between REPLAN_ESCALATE and STATUS:blocked so sub-agents know which to use:
- STATUS:blocked = user can answer questions to unblock planning
- REPLAN_ESCALATE = the story intent itself needs brainstorm-level re-examination; user input alone cannot unblock

## Files to Modify
- `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: SKILL.md contains REPLAN_ESCALATE signal
```
Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md && echo PASS
```

### AC2: SKILL.md contains EXPLANATION payload in signal format
```
Verify: grep -A2 'REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -q 'EXPLANATION' && echo PASS
```

### AC3: SKILL.md documents Unsatisfiable Criteria Detection
```
Verify: grep -q 'Unsatisfiable Criteria\|cannot be satisfied\|REPLAN_ESCALATE' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md && echo PASS
```

### AC4: SKILL.md documents distinction from STATUS:blocked
```
Verify: grep -B5 -A5 'REPLAN_ESCALATE' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -q 'STATUS:blocked' && echo PASS
```

### AC5: RED pytest passes (GREEN after implementation)
```
Verify: poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_replan_escalate.py -x -q 2>&1 | grep -q 'passed' && echo PASS
```

### AC6: RED eval passes (GREEN after implementation)
```
Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_ESCALATE' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml && echo 'Eval test present - run promptfoo eval to confirm GREEN'
```

### AC7: Shim check passes
```
Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md && echo PASS
```

### AC8: Existing STATUS:complete and STATUS:blocked signals remain intact
```
Verify: grep -q 'STATUS:complete' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md && grep -q 'STATUS:blocked' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md && echo PASS
```

comments.body:
GAP_ANALYSIS_AMENDMENT: Terminal signal behavior + canonical string requirements.

AC9: REPLAN_ESCALATE is a terminal signal (no further tasks emitted after it)
After emitting REPLAN_ESCALATE, SKILL.md must instruct implementation-plan to STOP all task decomposition immediately. It must NOT proceed to STATUS:complete or STATUS:blocked. The signal is the final output.
Verify: grep -A5 'REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm EXPLANATION' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -qi 'stop\|halt\|do not proceed\|final output' && echo PASS

AC10: Implementation uses canonical signal prefix matching contract fa7b-d4e9
The SKILL.md emission text must use exactly 'REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm EXPLANATION:' as the signal prefix (space after colon, space before EXPLANATION).
Verify: grep 'REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm EXPLANATION:' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md && echo PASS

Source: Gap analysis finding 2 (implicit_assumption: canonical string alignment) and finding 3 (missing_error_path: terminal signal behavior)
comments.author: Test
